top_signals.title: Trump faces G7 after year of trade wrath and diplomatic blusters
top_signals.summary: Every G7 leader — other than Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi — has been the target of attacks, criticism or mockery from the Republican billionaire.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
